title: Study Packages (Strategus)
description: Study Packages lets you build and execute multi-analysis OHDSI study packages using Strategus. A guided 5-step wizard walks you through naming your study, selecting analysis modules (CohortGenerator, CohortMethod, PatientLevelPrediction, etc.), assigning shared cohorts, validating the specification, and executing against a CDM data source.
tips: CohortGenerator is always included automatically as it is required to instantiate cohorts before any analysis module can run.
In the Select Modules step, choose from available OHDSI analysis modules like CohortMethod, PatientLevelPrediction, SelfControlledCaseSeries, and more.
Add shared cohorts in the Shared Cohorts step, assigning each a role of target, comparator, or outcome. Most modules require at least one target cohort.
Use the Review & Validate step to check your specification for configuration issues before committing to execution.
Import a previously exported Strategus JSON specification using the Import JSON button in the page header to restore a saved study design.
Export your current specification as JSON at any time using the Export JSON button for sharing with collaborators or archival.
In the Execute step, select a CDM data source and monitor the progress bar while Strategus orchestrates module execution.
After execution completes, review the summary showing modules executed, elapsed time, result file count, and output directory.
